properties.dose: Oral Light: 50-100mg Common: 100-250mg Strong: 250-400mg+ | Insufflated Light: 30-60mg Common: 60-150mg Strong: 150-300mg+
properties.effects: Euphoria, increased energy/alertness, Decreased need for sleep, Increased sociability, mood lift, increase libido, Excessive talking, Decreased appetite, Weight loss, Sweating, Disturbed sleep patterns, Bruxia, Visual and auditory hallucinations, itchiness, aggressiveness, moodiness.
properties.summary: The drug is also known as 5-methyl-ethylone, or 5-ME. This is a cathinone drug and a analogue of ethylone. The drug is suspected to be similar to other stimulants of the cathinone class, with a slightly higher potency than ethylone. The drug is possibly entactogenic and a monoamine releasing agent.
